cited_sources.note: each confirmed citation resolves to a real eidetic memory by content hash; unconfirmed ones are Gemini's and are NOT backed by your store.

grounding.method: deterministic lexical check vs the exported source text rebuilt from the immutable store (normalized substring + token overlap). NOT NLI, NOT eidetic's proof gate: catches fabricated/altered quotes and alien answer content, does not certify reasoning.

caveat: 0 tokens on YOUR metered model (NotebookLM/Gemini free tier does the read); answer is Gemini-side and NOT eidetic-verify-or-abstain. Provenance + cited_sources below let you CHECK which sources are real eidetic memories, even though the reasoning is not gate-verified.
